name: Aarti Surfactants Limited
summary: Aarti Surfactants Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells of ionic and non-ionic and specialty surfactants for the home and personal care, agro and oil, and other industrial applications in India and internationally. The company's products include surfactants, mild surfactants, rheology modifiers, pearlising agents, UV filters, preservatives, syndet and soap bases, sun care products, and active ingredients, as well as conditioning agents, blends, proteins, and quats. It serves skin care, oral, hair, cosmetics, bath and shower, sun care, fabric/laundry care, dishwashing, toilet care, and surface care segments. The company was formerly known as Arti Surfactants Limited. Aarti Surfactants Limited was incorporated in 2018 and is based in Mumbai, India.
